title: Admissions | Galgotias University
content: Admission Documents & Undertaking Galgotias University would be requiring the following documents and a checklist has been provided for your assistance: Document Checklist - 10th Mark Sheet - 10th Passing Certificate - 12th Mark Sheet - 12th Passing Certificate - Migration Certificate/Transfer Certificate - Gap year affidavit if applicable - Character Certificate - Medical Fitness Certificate (Original) - 4 Passport size photo - Diploma/ITI Mark Sheet (For Lateral Entry Students) - Graduation Mark Sheet & Degree (If Applicable) - Post-Graduation Mark Sheet & Degree (If Applicable) - Entrance Exam Score/Rank card (If Applicable) - Aadhaar Card (Mandatory) - Admission Offer Letter - Caste Certificate (In case of SC/ST/OBC) - Gap Certificate (If Applicable) - Certificate(s) for Sports Quota Admission (If Applicable) - Certificate of Armed Category (If Applicable) - Certificate of Differently Abled (If Applicable) - AIU Equivalence Certificate: Required from Students holding foreign Certificate / Diploma / Degree against the last qualification Note - Students are requested to bring the above-mentioned documents (Photocopies as well as originals) for verification. UNDERTAKING (Mandatory) Undertaking for Admission UGC Anti Ragging FormNote - Undertakings are compulsory to be filled and submitted at the time of Admission.
